variants: Santiago Villarroel is a key figure in the field of Social Epidemiology, where he is recognized for crafting the innovative Violet Signal Transposer. His exceptional contributions to public health earned him the Runestone Gale Emblem, an accolade that highlights his dedication to advancing community well-being. In addition to his academic work, Santiago actively participates in the Sunrise Mosaicists Collective, merging his expertise with his artistic interests. His development as a scholar was profoundly shaped by his mentor, Kristian Foged, who guided him through his doctoral studies.
